Author: rail
Name: AetherDraw
Description: A realtime multi-user whiteboard raid planner plugin to draw encounter strategies. Searchable database of community plans, supports url imports
Punchline: A realtime multi-user whiteboard raid planner and strat viewer. Compatible with https://aetherdraw.me
Changelog:
v7.5.0.0: api 15, page reorder fix
v2.4.8.0:IPC support for AetherBlackbox imports
v2.4.6.0:api bump, criterion support
v2.4.5.0: arena background, job icons expanded.
v2.4.4.2: API 14, 7.4
